support.title: Tell us how can we help 👋
support.subtitle: We are always available to provide you with the best services we can

questions.question: What is the Saudi Professional Accreditation Program for Legal Practitioners?
questions.answer: It is a program offered by the Saudi Bar Association that establishes a unified national framework for legal practitioners, ensuring the minimum level of knowledge and skills required to practice law and legal consultancy.

questions.question: What are the program's objectives?
questions.answer:
• Elevate the Kingdom's legal ranking internationally regarding licensing for legal practice.
• Ensure continuous qualification through training, guaranteeing knowledge continuity and beneficiary protection.
• Raise compliance with the legal practice system and related regulations.
• Obtain comprehensive databases enabling decision-makers to issue legislation.
• Protect the profession from malpractice and increase national competency rates.
• Enhance regulatory efficiency over practitioners.

questions.question: What are the benefits of registering in the program?
questions.answer: Accredited practitioners will be accepted by international professional bodies according to relevant agreements. The professional accreditation is evaluated locally and internationally by educational institutions and governmental bodies, adding credibility and reliability.

questions.question: What are the program stages?
questions.answer:
• Registration and Admission: The practitioner must meet all specified admission requirements.
• Legal and Regulatory Qualification: Divided into 4 levels, each consisting of 6 training modules.
• Final Exam and Personal Interview: A comprehensive computerized exam followed by a specialized committee interview.
• Accreditation: Issuance of the professional accreditation certificate by the Saudi Bar Association.

questions.question: What are the admission requirements for the program?
questions.answer: The applicant must hold a recognized degree in Sharia or Law from a Saudi university or its equivalent from outside the Kingdom.

questions.question: Is the program limited to a specific gender?
questions.answer: The Saudi Professional Accreditation Program for Legal Practitioners is available to all legal practitioners, both male and female.

questions.question: Is the program limited to legal practitioners?
questions.answer: The program is directed at lawyers, legal practitioners, and graduates of law and Sharia.

questions.question: Is the program limited to Saudi nationals?
questions.answer: The program is available to both Saudis and foreigners regardless of place of residence.

questions.question: How long does the program take?
questions.answer: The program duration is 6 months from the date of registration.

questions.question: Are there fees for the program?
questions.answer: The registration fee for the Saudi Professional Accreditation Program for Legal Practitioners is 4,600 Saudi Riyals.

questions.question: Can I start the program immediately after registration?
questions.answer: You can start the program immediately after registration and payment of fees.

questions.question: Does the platform require a specific browser?
questions.answer: All browsers (Google Chrome, Internet Explorer, etc.) are suitable and can be used to browse the Saudi Professional Accreditation platform.

questions.question: Can I access the platform via mobile phone?
questions.answer: You can access the platform through Safari or Google Chrome browsers on smart mobile devices.

questions.question: Where can I find the training materials on the platform?
questions.answer: You can find the training materials by clicking on your profile and selecting (My Programs) or searching for them using the quick search feature at the top of the page.

questions.question: Can I start the training materials in random order?
questions.answer: You must start sequentially so that the program allows you to proceed to the next one in order.

questions.question: Can I skip a module without finishing all the electronic content?
questions.answer: You can skip the training module by passing its promotion test.

questions.question: What is the promotion test?
questions.answer: It is an optional test to evaluate the practitioner's knowledge of the course content before starting it, allowing them to skip the course and move to the next one if they score above 80%.

questions.question: How can I confirm that I passed the training program?
questions.answer: You can confirm you passed the training program when you achieve a completion rate of 100%.

questions.question: What is the end-of-program test?
questions.answer: A test that measures the practitioner's understanding of each program after completion, conducted automatically through the platform from any convenient location.

questions.question: What should I do if I don't achieve the required score in the end-of-program test?
questions.answer: You must re-study the program content and take the test again.

questions.question: Can I join more than one program at the same time?
questions.answer: You cannot join more than one program at the same time. You must complete the current program before registering for the next one.

questions.question: I can't move to the next program despite completing all requirements. What should I do?
questions.answer: If the completion rate shows 67% despite completing all requirements, please refresh the page and log in again.

questions.question: How can I contact the platform's technical support team?
questions.answer: You can contact the technical support team directly through the live chat at the bottom right of the page.

questions.question: How can I update my personal information?
questions.answer: You can update your personal information by logging into the accreditation platform, going to your profile, adding the information you want to update, and clicking Save.

questions.question: How can I recover my account password?
questions.answer: Log into the accreditation platform, click on Login, then click on (Forgot Password?), enter your email, and you will receive a message allowing you to reset your password.

questions.question: What are the requirements for obtaining accreditation?
questions.answer:
• Register in the program.
• Pass all electronic programs on the platform.
• Pass the final exam.
• Pass the personal interview.

questions.question: Which entity is responsible for granting the accreditation certificate?
questions.answer: The Saudi Bar Association is the entity responsible for granting Saudi Professional Accreditation certificates for legal practitioners.

questions.question: What is Tadarab platform?
questions.answer: In the era of digital transformation in Saudi Arabia, Tadarab platform was established to provide technological solutions enabling training organizations to grow by converting their training content into electronic training programs.

questions.question: Who can benefit from the platform?
questions.answer:
• Accredited training institutes wanting to manage their remote training.
• Trainees interested in attending courses on the platform.
• Organizations wanting to train their employees with dedicated courses.

questions.question: What training fields does the platform support?
questions.answer: All types of fields and training methods are supported.

questions.question: How can I register on the platform as a trainee?
questions.answer: Once you join any course, your account is automatically registered with the same entered information.

questions.question: How can I log in?
questions.answer: From the login page, enter your email and password.

questions.question: I forgot my password?
questions.answer: From the login page, click on (Forgot password?) and enter your email. You will receive an email to reset your password.

questions.question: How can I edit my personal information?
questions.answer: After logging in, go to your profile page where you can edit all your information.

questions.question: How do I register for a training program?
questions.answer: After selecting a suitable booking date, click the Join button and fill in the required information. Upon completion, you will be automatically enrolled and receive a booking confirmation email.

questions.question: Can I register for more than one program?
questions.answer: Yes, you can register for multiple programs at times that suit you.

questions.question: What language are the programs offered in?
questions.answer: We support both Arabic and English, and each institute can determine the language in which they want to offer their program.

questions.question: What payment methods are accepted?
questions.answer: Mada / Visa.

questions.question: I didn't receive a confirmation or reminder email from the platform?
questions.answer: If you registered with a work email, please contact your IT department to allow messages to reach your inbox. If registered with a personal email, contact technical support directly. Reminder messages are sent one day before the program starts.

questions.question: What browsers are suitable for using Tadarab platform?
questions.answer: We recommend using Chrome or Firefox for the best experience.

questions.question: Can I use the platform from a phone or tablet?
questions.answer: Of course, the platform supports all interfaces and devices. However, we recommend using a laptop for a better training experience as some content may not work properly on small screens.

questions.question: What is the mechanism of the final accreditation exam?
questions.answer:
• The final exam is a comprehensive computerized test covering all levels.
• The exam date is set after completing all training programs.
• A minimum score of 80% is required to pass.
• The trainee must comply with exam policies and instructions.
• The trainee may postpone the exam with an acceptable excuse at least 48 hours in advance.
• If absent or failing, a first retry is granted for 600 SAR.
• If the first retry is not passed, a second retry is granted for the same fee.
• If all attempts are exhausted, the trainee is excluded and must register as a new trainee.

tour.title: Accreditation Journey
tour.subtitle: Learn about the 5 steps to get your accreditation certificate

steps.title: Program Payment
steps.description: The first step is to register and pay for the accreditation program. Your account will be activated automatically after payment.

steps.title: Upload Qualification
steps.description: Upload a copy of your academic qualification (Bachelor's or higher) in Law or Sharia. It will be reviewed and approved.

steps.title: Study Training Programs
steps.description: Complete all training programs across 4 levels. Each level contains a set of specialized courses you need to finish.

steps.title: Final Accreditation Exam
steps.description: After completing all courses, book an appointment for the final accreditation exam and pass it successfully.

steps.title: Accreditation Certificate
steps.description: Congratulations! Enter your name in Arabic and English and receive your official professional accreditation certificate.
